extortion.description: Aseguradora Fortaleza is a leading Bolivian insurance company and a key subsidiary of Grupo Fortaleza, one of Bolivia's most prominent financial services conglomerates. Founded in 1975 as "Crucena Cooperativa de Seguros" and transformed into a joint-stock company in 1999, the company has established itself as a trusted provider of comprehensive insurance solutions across Bolivia. Financial Performance Total Premiums: USD 26.9 million combined General Insurance Premiums: USD 18.4 million (4.9% market share) Life Insurance Premiums: USD 8.5 million (2.3% market share) Total Assets: USD 9.1 million
